channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: AMC will stream ‘The Audacity’ premiere in 21 parts on TikTok
item.description: Is this a smart way to build buzz, or just an odd attempt to recreate Quibi?

item.title: ‘Marvel Rivals’ Wants to Start Being More Than Just a Hero Shooter
item.description: Like the comics it's based on, 'Marvel Rivals' will be around for a long time if NetEase has anything to say about it.

item.title: Want cafe-quality lattes at home without buying an expensive new coffee machine? Jura's new gadget upgrades your drinks with perfectly foamed milk every time
item.description: Jura's new Automatic Milk Frother prepares silky hot and cold microfoam for espresso-based drinks, and can even make hot chocolate.

item.title: ‘How Do We Make Sure That Claude Behaves Itself?’: Anthropic Invited 15 Christians for a Summit
item.description: Anthropic is reportedly looking to be steered by various kinds of moral thinkers.

item.title: 'A self-inflicted hit': Washington state just rolled back sales tax exemptions for AI data centers worth hundreds of millions
item.description: Washington narrowed a key data center tax break, reflecting broader tensions as states reconsider incentives amid industry resistance and rising public concerns.

item.title: Playing The Last of Us with friends made my favorite PlayStation game feel brand new again
item.description: My fourth playthrough of The Last of Us was also my friend’s first – here’s what I learned by playing it as a group.

item.title: See the Next ‘Hunger Games’ in This Trip Down Memory Lane
item.description: The 'Hunger Games' series has come pretty far, and it's got at least one more movie in it with 'Sunrise on the Reaping.
